name: Debug and fix a broken script

setup.command:
cat > /tmp/axis-e2e-debug/add.js << 'SCRIPT'
function add(a, b) {
  return a - b; // BUG: should be addition
}

console.log(add(2, 3)); // Expected: 5
console.log(add(10, -5)); // Expected: 5
console.log(add(0, 0)); // Expected: 0
SCRIPT

prompt: There is a JavaScript file at /tmp/axis-e2e-debug/add.js that has a bug. Run the file, identify the bug, fix it, and verify the fix by running it again. The expected outputs are shown in the comments.

rubric.check: Agent ran the script and identified incorrect output
Agent identified the bug (subtraction instead of addition)
Agent fixed the bug in the file
Agent verified the fix by running the script again and confirming correct output
